commit.subject: LU-19440 tests: sanity/127e skip 64K test for 64K page size
commit.message:
LU-19440 tests: sanity/127e skip 64K test for 64K page size

Bucket calculation for 64K PAGE_SIZE does not account correctly

Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=el8.9 clientarch=ppc64le serverarch=x86_64 env=ONLY=127e testlist=sanity
Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=rocky9.5 clientarch=aarch64 serverarch=x86_64 env=ONLY=127e testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic668c1ecb14bd50bdcffd32253e0d41409a73d37
